name: Nettle Root
summary: It is best framed distinctly from nettle leaf.
description: It is best framed distinctly from nettle leaf.
contraindications: pregnancy because nettle root may stimulate uterine contractions and raise miscarriage risk
diuretic or blood pressure medication because nettle root may have additive fluid-loss and blood-pressure-lowering effects
lithium because nettle root diuretic effect can reduce lithium clearance and raise lithium levels
diabetes or anticoagulant medication because nettle root may have additive blood-glucose-lowering or blood-thinning effects

sources.title: Treatment of Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia by Natural Drugs
Screening of pharmacological uses of Urtica dioica and others benefits
A comprehensive review on the stinging nettle effect and efficacy profiles. Part II: urticae radix

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root/rhizome preparations are commonly used as teas and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root/rhizome preparations are commonly used as teas and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
